description: Comprehensive monitoring dashboard for CloudNativePG (CNPG) PostgreSQL clusters running on Kubernetes. Covers cluster health, replication, WAL archiving, database activity, storage, checkpoints, buffer cache, locks, backups, PgBouncer connection pooling, and Kubernetes resource usage.
title: CloudNativePG Cluster Dashboard

15736632-0e29-49d6-9336-aa3ec00a145a.description: Kubernetes namespace where CloudNativePG clusters are deployed
15736632-0e29-49d6-9336-aa3ec00a145a.name: namespace
15736632-0e29-49d6-9336-aa3ec00a145a.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'namespace'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name = 'cnpg_collector_up'

20353f96-724d-414f-96a8-0138a5445ca8.name: cluster
20353f96-724d-414f-96a8-0138a5445ca8.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'cluster'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name = 'cnpg_collector_up'
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'namespace') = '{{.namespace}}'

266db9aa-32ae-43b7-97c6-49dc6eae607e.name: instance
266db9aa-32ae-43b7-97c6-49dc6eae607e.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'pod'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name = 'cnpg_collector_up'
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'namespace') = '{{.namespace}}'
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'cluster') = '{{.cluster}}'

widgets.description: CloudNativePG cluster health and status overview
widgets.title: Cluster Overview

widgets.description: Total number of PostgreSQL instances in the CNPG cluster
widgets.title: Total Instances

widgets.description: Number of instances that are ready and serving traffic
widgets.title: Ready Instances

widgets.description: Number of instances that are NOT ready - requires immediate attention if > 0
widgets.title: Not Ready Instances

widgets.description: Indicates which instance is currently the primary (value = 1 for primary)
widgets.title: Current Primary

widgets.description: CNPG collector up/down status for each instance over time
widgets.title: Collector Up Status

widgets.description: Shows role of each instance (0 = primary, 1 = replica/standby)
widgets.title: Instance Roles

widgets.description: PostgreSQL server availability status per instance
widgets.title: PostgreSQL Up

widgets.description: Total number of switchover/failover events that have occurred
widgets.title: Switchover Count

widgets.description: Write-Ahead Log and replication metrics
widgets.title: Replication & WAL

widgets.description: Replication lag in bytes between primary and each replica
widgets.title: Replication Lag (bytes)

widgets.description: Estimated replication lag in seconds for each streaming replica
widgets.title: Replication Lag (seconds)

widgets.description: WAL sent by primary and received/replayed by replicas (LSN positions)
widgets.title: WAL Sent vs Received

widgets.description: Rate of WAL files being archived over time
widgets.title: WAL Archiving Rate

widgets.description: Cumulative count of archived WAL files
widgets.title: WAL Files Archived (total)

widgets.description: Cumulative count of failed WAL archiving attempts - non-zero indicates archival issues
widgets.title: WAL Archiving Failures (total)

widgets.description: Time since the last successful WAL archival - increasing value indicates archiving problems
widgets.title: Seconds Since Last Archival

widgets.description: Current WAL Log Sequence Number position on each instance
widgets.title: Current WAL LSN

widgets.description: Number of streaming replication connections from primary to replicas
widgets.title: Streaming Replication Connected

widgets.description: Number and status of replication slots
widgets.title: Replication Slots

widgets.description: Connection and transaction metrics
widgets.title: Database Activity

widgets.description: Number of currently active database connections per instance
widgets.title: Active Connections

widgets.description: Breakdown of connections by state (active, idle, idle in transaction, etc.)
widgets.title: Connections by State

widgets.description: Maximum allowed connections vs current usage per instance
widgets.title: Max Connections

widgets.description: Rate of committed and rolled-back transactions per second
widgets.title: Transactions Per Second

widgets.description: Total transactions committed per database per instance
widgets.title: Transactions Committed (total)

widgets.description: Total transactions rolled back - high values may indicate application errors
widgets.title: Transactions Rolled Back (total)

widgets.description: Number of connections currently waiting for a lock
widgets.title: Waiting Connections

widgets.description: Connections in 'idle in transaction' state - long-running idle transactions can hold locks and consume resources
widgets.title: Idle in Transaction Connections

widgets.description: Database and tablespace size metrics
widgets.title: Database Size & Storage

widgets.description: Total size of each database across instances
widgets.title: Database Size

widgets.description: Rate of database size growth per hour - helps predict storage needs
widgets.title: Database Size Growth Rate

widgets.description: Sum of all database sizes per instance
widgets.title: Total Database Size

widgets.description: Estimated ratio of dead tuples to live tuples per table - high values indicate need for VACUUM
widgets.title: Table Bloat Estimate

widgets.description: Disk usage per tablespace (if multiple tablespaces are configured)
widgets.title: Disk Usage by Tablespace

widgets.description: Size of temporary files created by queries - large values may indicate insufficient work_mem
widgets.title: Temporary File Size

widgets.description: Rate of temporary file creation per database
widgets.title: Temporary Files Created Rate

widgets.description: Checkpoint activity and autovacuum metrics
widgets.title: Checkpoint & Maintenance

widgets.description: Checkpoints triggered by request (forced) vs scheduled (timed) - too many requested checkpoints indicate heavy write load
widgets.title: Checkpoints Requested vs Timed

widgets.description: Time spent writing during checkpoints in milliseconds
widgets.title: Checkpoint Write Time

widgets.description: Time spent syncing files to disk during checkpoints
widgets.title: Checkpoint Sync Time

widgets.description: Number of buffers written during checkpoints
widgets.title: Buffers Written by Checkpoint

widgets.description: Number of autovacuum workers currently running
widgets.title: Autovacuum Workers Active

widgets.description: Number of dead tuples per user table - high values indicate VACUUM is needed
widgets.title: Dead Tuples by Table

widgets.description: Time since last autovacuum for each user table
widgets.title: Last Autovacuum Time

widgets.description: Time since last autoanalyze for each user table
widgets.title: Last Autoanalyze Time

widgets.description: Shared buffer utilization and I/O statistics
widgets.title: Buffer Cache & I/O Performance

widgets.description: Buffer cache hit ratio per database - should be > 99% for OLTP workloads

promql.name: A
promql.query: cnpg_pg_stat_database_blks_hit{namespace=~"{{.namespace}}", cluster=~"{{.cluster}}", pod=~"{{.instance}}"} / (cnpg_pg_stat_database_blks_hit{namespace=~"{{.namespace}}", cluster=~"{{.cluster}}", pod=~"{{.instance}}"} + cnpg_pg_stat_database_blks_read{namespace=~"{{.namespace}}", cluster=~"{{.cluster}}", pod=~"{{.instance}}"} + 0.001) * 100

widgets.title: Cache Hit Ratio

widgets.description: Rate of disk blocks read from disk vs served from shared buffers
widgets.title: Blocks Read vs Hit

widgets.description: Rate of buffers written directly by backends (bypassing bgwriter) - high values indicate bgwriter cannot keep up
widgets.title: Backend Buffers Written

widgets.description: Rate of fsyncs performed by backends - should ideally be zero
widgets.title: Backend Fsync Count

widgets.description: Rate of rows returned by queries per database
widgets.title: Rows Fetched Rate

widgets.description: Rate of rows inserted per database
widgets.title: Rows Inserted Rate

widgets.description: Rate of rows updated per database
widgets.title: Rows Updated Rate

widgets.description: Rate of rows deleted per database
widgets.title: Rows Deleted Rate

widgets.description: Lock contention and database conflict metrics
widgets.title: Locks & Conflicts

widgets.description: Number of locks held per mode (AccessShare, RowExclusive, etc.)
widgets.title: Locks by Mode

widgets.description: Number of exclusive locks (AccessExclusive, Exclusive) - can cause severe contention
widgets.title: Exclusive Locks

widgets.description: Rate of deadlocks detected per database - any deadlocks indicate application concurrency issues
widgets.title: Deadlocks

widgets.description: Rate of queries cancelled due to conflicts with recovery on replicas
widgets.title: Conflicts

widgets.description: Number of queries currently blocked waiting for locks
widgets.title: Waiting Queries (Lock Waits)

widgets.description: Number of active queries running for more than 5 minutes
widgets.title: Long Running Queries

widgets.description: Backup status, duration, and recovery metrics
widgets.title: Backup & Recovery

widgets.description: Duration of the most recent backup in seconds
widgets.title: Last Backup Duration

widgets.description: Seconds elapsed since last successful backup - alert if > backup schedule interval
widgets.title: Time Since Last Backup

widgets.description: Size of the most recent backup
widgets.title: Backup Size

widgets.description: Size of WAL segment files
widgets.title: WAL Segment Size

widgets.description: Whether the last backup was successful (1) or failed (0)
widgets.title: Last Backup Success

widgets.description: Historical view of backup durations over time
widgets.title: Backup History Timeline

widgets.description: PgBouncer metrics when connection pooling is enabled in CNPG
widgets.title: PgBouncer Connection Pooling

widgets.description: Number of active server connections in PgBouncer pools
widgets.title: PgBouncer Active Connections

widgets.description: Number of client connections to PgBouncer
widgets.title: PgBouncer Client Connections

widgets.description: Number of idle server connections available in PgBouncer pools
widgets.title: PgBouncer Server Idle Connections

widgets.description: Maximum time a client had to wait for a connection
widgets.title: PgBouncer Max Wait Time

widgets.description: Rate of SQL queries executed through PgBouncer
widgets.title: PgBouncer Total Queries

widgets.description: Average query duration through PgBouncer
widgets.title: PgBouncer Query Duration (avg)

widgets.description: Data throughput through PgBouncer
widgets.title: PgBouncer Bytes In/Out

widgets.description: Number of connections currently going through the login process
widgets.title: PgBouncer Login Connections

widgets.description: CPU, memory, and storage metrics for CNPG pods
widgets.title: Resource Usage (Kubernetes)

widgets.description: CPU usage per CNPG pod (requires container metrics collection)
widgets.title: CPU Usage by Pod

widgets.description: Memory (RSS) usage per CNPG pod
widgets.title: Memory Usage by Pod

widgets.description: Working set memory per CNPG pod - what K8s uses for OOM decisions
widgets.title: Memory Working Set by Pod

widgets.description: Persistent Volume Claim usage (data directory size)
widgets.title: PVC Usage

widgets.description: Available space in Persistent Volume Claims
widgets.title: PVC Available Space

widgets.description: Total capacity vs used for Persistent Volume Claims
widgets.title: PVC Capacity

widgets.description: Network bytes received per CNPG pod
widgets.title: Network Receive Rate

widgets.description: Network bytes transmitted per CNPG pod
widgets.title: Network Transmit Rate
